detail_desc:
MouseRider is the greatest mortal sage ever.  He is also a most troubled
man, knowing things you couldn't even guess at.  You wonder how he could have
all that knowledge and not want power.
long_desc: MouseRider sits on his throne here, his head in his hands.

detail_desc:
The Sentinel Beast is somewhat reminiscent of a wolf if you ignore the
multi-colored glowing eyes, the horns, the six inch long claws...
long_desc: The Sentinel Beast's eyes glow chaotically as it attacks!

detail_desc:
Leonna seems to be a nice, fun-loving woman.  Obviously she became
guildmaster due more to her personality than her wizardly power.  Her powers
are no small matter, however; she is still one of the best mages in the city.
long_desc: Leonna, guildmaster of the Mages' Guild of Kerofk, greets you.

detail_desc:
The Bookstore Owner looks very bored in his job here.  From the way his
fingers twitch and his eyes dart, you wonder if he really is what he appears...
long_desc: The Bookstore Owner looks up from a paperback as you come in.

detail_desc:
Seobagn snickers at you while he spins a coin around his fingers with
practised ease.  You wonder if its your coin.
long_desc: The Thieves' Guildmaster, Seobagn, watches you with narrowed eyes.

detail_desc:
The Bartender looks harried as he tries to keep up with several different
orders at the same time.  Maybe you should bother him later...
long_desc: The Bartender pours drinks several at a time to keep up with the rush.

detail_desc:
The barmaid looks at you with a tired glance as she struggles to keep up
with the thirsty populace.  'What do you want?  ' she asks while pulling out an
order pad.
long_desc: The barmaids rush about delivering drinks and taking orders.

detail_desc: The drunk person looks at you and slurs, 'Whatre you lookin' at, bozo?  '
long_desc: A drunk person is here, babbling about something incessantly.

detail_desc: The lucky gambler looks at you and snickers.  Poor Boy!
long_desc: A lucky gambler is here, striking it rich!

detail_desc:
The dealer looks at you flatly and says, 'Are you in or out?  ' He really
doesn't seem to care one way or another.
long_desc: The dealer sets out a new hand for all to play.

detail_desc:
Benzaldehyde is a big man, reminding you of some elephants you've seen.
His eyes light up while he counts his money--a man possessed by his greed.
long_desc: Ben counts his money, ignoring you completely.

detail_desc:
The shopkeeper here is the legendary Bob's wife Ginger.  She welcomes you to
her establishment and invites you to browse as long as you wish.
long_desc: The shopkeeper smiles at you as you enter her store.

detail_desc:
The unlucky gambler just doesn't say a word, he just keeps putting the money
down, hoping to at least break even.  It doesn't even look like he's got a
chance.
long_desc: An unlucky gambler struggles to hold back tears as his money disappears.

detail_desc:
The citizen seems very upset about something.  You're not sure exactly what,
but he seems anxious to tell you.  The more he talks, the more your attention
wanders until you're ready to go.
long_desc: A citizen is here, debating politics with anyone who will listen.

detail_desc:
Myrama is all smiles as you look at her.  She is bright, witty, and the only
reason why Kell is so successful.  Myrama is truly marvelous!
long_desc: The receptionist smiles and offers you a room.

detail_desc:
The herbalist is an ancient woman, but she still seems spry and sharp-minded
when it comes to plants.  You've no doubt this woman is an expert in her field.
long_desc: The herbalist is here, reading to her plants.

detail_desc:
The lawyer looks at you, ready to spot anything he can sue you for.  This
has got to be one of the most loathsome mobs in the whole mud!
long_desc: The lawyer is here, ready to lie his tongue out.

detail_desc:
The secretary is a bored, out-of-place looking man, until you spot the
hidden daggers in his sleeve, boot, shirt, down his back, etc.  (not too good
at hiding them, is he?  ).  Obviously, this man is here more to protect the
mayor than to do office work.
long_desc: The secretary pops his gum and asks you what you want.

detail_desc:
The mayor seems happy to see you, even though you interrupted his putting
practice.  He sits you down, offers you a drink, and asks what he can do for
you.
long_desc: Mayor Kell greets you into his office with a welcoming hand.

detail_desc:
The Council Guards are impressive.  As you look upon their pikes and plate
armor, a little part of your brain start screaming about how you'd be crazy to
mess with them.
long_desc: The Council Guards look ready to rip you apart if you disturb the meeting.

detail_desc: The council member is not just another politician...  He can fight, too!
long_desc: The council member looks quite upset as you interrupt them!

detail_desc:
The jailer looks bored, as if he was in a Fortran class.  That bored...
Really!
long_desc: The jailer reads his newspaper while sitting in his chair.

detail_desc:
The prisoner looks up at you weakly and mumbles, 'I am not a number!  ' He
gasps and looks dejected again.
long_desc: A prisoner here has given up all hopes of escape.

detail_desc:
The innguard looks fearless and ready to defend the patrons of the Fortress
at a moments notice.
long_desc: A innguard is here, ready to fight off some marauding hordes.

detail_desc:
Jenk is a lowdown no good shopkeeper who'll sell anything to make a gold!
He's corrupt, greedy, and you're kind of man!
long_desc: Jenk is here, ready to sell you anything!

detail_desc:
The black marketeer has set up shop in Jenk's place to sell just what you
need...  Now what is it that you need?
long_desc: The black marketeer is here ready to sell you anything you want.

detail_desc:
The priest looks like a kindly man who has seen too much suffering for one
life.  He now devotes his life to XXXX, hoping to one day ascend to
immortality.
long_desc: A priest is here, performing his absolutions.

detail_desc:
The High Priest will be ascending to XXXX soon, and now his entire body
glows with the same light as his soul.
long_desc: The High Priest is here, glowing with the benevolence of AO.

detail_desc:
The recruiting sergeant has seen the world.  Now he's trying to make you do
the same.  ARGH!!!  Resist!  Resist!!
long_desc: The recruiting sergeant tries to make you sign his forms.

detail_desc:
The Captain has a true love of civilized fighting.  He raises his eyebrow to
you...  Shall we have a go at it?
long_desc: The Captain of the Guard salutes you with his epee.

detail_desc:
The beggar looks up at you with sad eyes.  However, you notice something
shiny clenched in his hand...  What is he hiding?
long_desc: A beggar sits here, waiting for handouts.

detail_desc:
The citizen looks at you with a flat stare.  You can see he's wondering if
you'll butt in line.
long_desc: A citizen is here, waiting in line.

detail_desc:
This citizen really doesn't have time to fool around with adventurers; he
has too much to do.
long_desc: A citizen of Kerofk is here, going about his business.

detail_desc: The militia guardsman looks very well trained, for a citizen.
long_desc: A militia guard is here keeping the peace.

detail_desc:
Kervin is very odd looking....  He has a big unkempt shock of white hair
that stick straight up and wears an electric blue robe to hide the rest of his
features.
long_desc: Kervin the wandering mage is well, ...wandering here.

detail_desc:
The guard guard looks at you and enunciates very clearly, 'Guard guard guard
guard guard guard guard guard guard.  ' (looks like he got the right job!  )
long_desc: The gateguard is here, guarding the gate.

detail_desc:
You try to look closer at the light and nearly burn your retinas clear off.
That wasn't too bright now, was it?
long_desc: A bright shining light here nearly blinds you!

detail_desc: The wisp is made up of clammy, misty air, and a bad attitude.
long_desc: Some guardian wisps here attack!

detail_desc:
The orb is pure crystal and shines with a bright aura.  This is surely the
object of your quest!
long_desc: The orb glows with a pure white light.

detail_desc:
This liche was once the troubled MouseRider.  Now he has finally lunged for
power and achieved it, making him immortal.  Will you be able to stop him?
long_desc: The liche that was MouseRider curses you horribly!

detail_desc:
The demons are spindly with great bats wings and glowing blue eyes.  They
are twisted things not of nature.  They attack!
long_desc: The storm demons attack on the Liche's order!

detail_desc:
Tiersten, the patriarch of this odd, odd, family, turns out to be a vampire.
And a demonologist to boot!  He growls incoherently at you as he attacks!
long_desc: Tiersten looks at you with angry eyes and bared fangs!

detail_desc:
There doesn't seem to be much to look at, besides the coiling mist attacking
you!
long_desc: A mist-like being stabs at you with a tendril!

detail_desc:
Sosivia struggles to hold onto her artist's soul, in spite of her family.
She is a beautiful woman that you wish you could take away from all this.
long_desc: Sosivia stands here, lost in daydreams.

detail_desc:
Celia is Talbot and Korino's sister, and Sosivia's mother.  She is the head
of the household as far as you can tell, and leeches onto the power with a
death-grip.  What a horrible woman!
long_desc: Celia sneers at you...Sneer!  Sneer!

detail_desc:
Talbot has a permanent sneer on his face.  He barely glances at you as he
beats his brother's sword back to take a vicious swipe...
long_desc: Talbot spars with his brother Korino here.

detail_desc:
Korino looks at you with barely disguised contempt as he parries Talbot's
blow and ripostes around...
long_desc: Korino spars with his brother Talbot here.

detail_desc:
He smiles, leans back, and tries to look bored to cover that vulturous
attitude.  He doesn't quite succeed; he IS a lawyer, after all.
long_desc: Bungle Fleecem, esquire, looks at you expectantly.

detail_desc:
He looks tired and dirty.  A glare out of the corner of his eye, and he
dismisses you easily.  He doesn't seem to care one whit about you.
long_desc: A gravedigger works away the night shift here.

detail_desc:
This citizen really doesn't have time to fool around with adventurers; she
has far too much to do.
long_desc: A citizen of Kerofk is here, going about her business.

detail_desc:
It's hide is a deep brownish-red hue, but its eyes are the most noticeable
about this magnificent beast.  Red within red eyes, with tiny pupils of black
in the center.
long_desc: A hellhound looks at you with hunger.

detail_desc:
You see the bloodlust in its eyes, and know there's no reasoning with this
creature...
long_desc: A goblin launches into a frenzied attack!

detail_desc: She looks wearied, but keeps hanging in there!
long_desc: The farmer sells her lackluster with all the excitement it warrants.

detail_desc: She looks at you happily, and pushes a ledger at you.
long_desc: A receptionist stands in front of you, waiting to help you.

detail_desc:
The Bartender looks harried as he tries to keep up with several different
orders at the same time.  Maybe you should bother him later...
long_desc: The Bartender pours drinks several at a time to keep up with the rush.
